name: list_products
description: Browse and search the product catalog with filtering by collection, category, tags, and pricing. Returns product details including variants, images, and availability per region.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query to filter products by title or description.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Filter by one or more collection IDs.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Filter by one or more product category IDs.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of products to return per page. Defaults to 20.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of products to skip for pagination.

products.title: Medusa T-Shirt
products.description: A comfortable cotton t-shirt with the Medusa logo.
